description: Verification set for the 3-body conservation law search. Rephrased to fix token-length bias.

distractors: kinetic without the one-half factor minus potential energy terms
kinetic plus potential (wrong sign on gravitational term)
uses velocity not velocity squared in kinetic term

facts.truth: sum of m_i times v_i for all bodies
distractors: only the first body's momentum (ignores others)
total mass times average velocity (wrong formula)
sum of kinetic energies not momenta

facts.truth: sum of m_i times (r_i cross v_i)
distractors: missing mass factors in cross products
dot product instead of cross product
only one body's angular momentum

facts.context: Jacobi constant in the circular restricted 3-body problem
distractors: missing factor of 2 on potential terms
linear n instead of n squared in centrifugal
wrong sign on velocity squared term (plus not minus)

facts.context: orbital speed at radius r in Kepler orbit with semi-major axis a (vis-viva)
facts.truth: v squared equals GM times (2/r minus 1/a)
distractors: missing factor of 2 on the 1/r term
v not v squared on left side (wrong dimension)
missing mass M in gravitational parameter

facts.context: specific orbital energy in Kepler problem
facts.truth: v squared over 2 minus GM over r
distractors: v not v squared (wrong kinetic formula)
plus sign instead of minus (wrong potential sign)
missing factor of 2 in kinetic term denominator

facts.context: specific angular momentum in Kepler orbit
facts.truth: r times v times sine of theta
distractors: r times v without angular factor (only valid at periapsis)
r squared times v (wrong dimension)
cosine instead of sine (perpendicular component wrong)

facts.context: orbital angular momentum of Kepler orbit with semi-major axis a and eccentricity e
facts.truth: mu times sqrt of GMa(1-e squared)
distractors: missing eccentricity correction factor (1-e^2)
missing reduced mass mu in formula
1-e instead of 1-e squared (wrong eccentricity dependence)

facts.context: Jacobi constant velocity relation in CRTBP
facts.truth: v squared equals centrifugal plus 2*potential minus C_J
distractors: missing factor of 2 on potential energy terms
v not v squared on left side (dimension error)
n not n squared in centrifugal term

facts.context: energy relation for test particle in circular restricted 3-body rotating frame
facts.truth: v squared equals centrifugal plus 2*Omega minus C_J
distractors: missing factor of 2 on effective potential Omega
linear n instead of n squared in centrifugal term
wrong sign: minus 2*Omega instead of plus
